channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
Flies!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 347, Underhill Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush blocks pavement, 11th July
item.description:
Overhanging and next to lamp post. Dangerous and annoying. Please cur right back so folk don’t need to walk in road and wheelchair users etc can pass. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 195-197, Crystal Palace Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in Road, 11th July
item.description:
Dead fox in Road about 100 yards before the junction with Bexley Lane. This is the part of Rectory Lane heading towards Foots Cray Meadows.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two pillows left by recycling men on pavement, 11th July
item.description:
I witnessed The recycling men (dustbin men) took the two pillows out of the green sacks and continued to throw the recycling rubbish into the truck. The left them closed to where I need to drive my electric wheelchair. I live at 4 Christie rd, E9 5EA.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rats and vermin, 11th July
item.description:
The person in 60i is continually putting food out for the birds and squirrels it is causing a n issue with rats and also noise from the parakeets.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees completely block pavement meaning you have to step into the road on a bend. Very dangerous, 11th July
item.description:
Already reported a month ago. Nothing done.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 11th July
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damp clothes hanging, 11th July
item.description:
Few days ago was damp clothes hanging next tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Spurstowe Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Why park in the car park at the park and walk a few steps when you can dump the cars right in the middle of the park, 11th July
item.description:
Two cars parked in one of the fields in beckenham place park - seems to belong to some sort of staff members for the upcoming event - not only did not park in the car park that's 5 minutes away but also parked on the grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brangbourne Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tranquil Vale outside Belmont Cleaners next to Crown Pub : pavement protective metal bollard demolished by vehicle impact, 11th July
item.description:
Tranquil Vale outside Belmont Cleaners next to Crown Pub : pavement protective metal bollard demolished by vehicle impact See photographs It is the left hand bollard in this location shot Https://www.instantstreetview.com/@51.466747,0.007379,196.05h,-7.51p,2.7z,AuvJv9-Ox_4t7L-Nl3MoKw Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Tranquil Vale, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter 0104 0187 at bus stop C Central Avenue / Welling Station towards Bexleyheath : Countdown Board perpetual error displayed, 11th July
item.description:
Bus shelter 0104 0187 at bus stop C Central Avenue / Welling Station towards Bexleyheath : Countdown Board perpetual error displayed Previously reported as FMS 9470206 and shown as fixed but it was not See photographs I don't recall seeing this board displaying bus actual times since it was reinstalled Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Melbourne Grove next to phone shop-bin needs emptying, 11th July
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 72 Grove Vale outside Blackbird Bakery-full Bin, 11th July
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: 18 Grove Vale outside Marks and Spencers-Litter Bin full, 11th July
item.description:
Bin needs to emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-22, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: 72 Grove Vale Litter Bin full of waste, 11th July
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: 68 Lordship Lane outside Screwfix-Bin overflowing with waste, 11th July
item.description:
Bin needs to be emptied.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-70, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug dealing drug use, 11th July
item.description:
Since the women living in the hmo skinny white lady has been living in here on the corner their has been a tent on the cemetry and now on the embankment, the hostel near the catholic church also socialise with these on the bench and they are using the stairs at the bowling alley to underground carpark to use drugs and go a toilet
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Methuen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree branches, 11th July
item.description:
The overgrown tree branch is obstructing the pavement and making it unsafe, especially for wheelchair users. This is an accessibility and safety hazard. Please arrange urgent maintenance to clear the obstruction.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Imperial Way, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa and table, 11th July
item.description:
Sofa and table dumped on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road and paths not being cleaned, 11th July
item.description:
Reported many times that the road is not being cleaned. Previous reports closed down but still no action to clean the paths and road and drains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15;15a, London Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
